subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Hear thou My call once again, even as thou didst hear it aforetime when thou didst enter the Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد اسمع ندائی مره اخری کما سمعت من قبل حین الذی دخلت بقعه الفردوس
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Satan; the Evil One
